title: The four pillars — fairness, transparency, accountability, harm prevention

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Four-cell comparison table showing each pillar with its definition, a violation example, and a practical checklist signal — structural categorical layout aids retention of four parallel concepts

depth_signals: Four named sub-concepts each requiring definition + counter-example + interdependence section; implementation checklists add a sixth subsection; real-world patterns section ties back to three prior topics
